Phase.process_management_desc: Management of {phaseTitle} process for the sub-criterion.
Phase.suggestion_empty_desc: If you have a suggestion for upper management or other units, click the "Add New Suggestion" button.
Phase.suggestion_placeholder: Write your suggestion in detail here...
Phase.reject_description: You are about to reject this PDCA evaluation. Please enter a reason for rejection.
Phase.reject_reason_placeholder: E.g., The uploaded evidence file is missing...
Phase.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? (It will be updated in the database when you click Save)
Phase.reject_empty: Please enter a reason for rejection.

Criteria.title: Criteria
Criteria.description: Manage the criteria to be evaluated for institutional accreditation.

Suggestions.title: Upper Unit Suggestions Report
Suggestions.description: All suggestions submitted by units during the "Improvement" phase are listed hierarchically.
Suggestions.no_suggestion_desc: Units have not yet entered an upper unit suggestion in the "Improvement" phase.
Suggestions.auto_generated_footer: This document was automatically generated by the quality management system.
Suggestions.unauthorized_desc: You do not have permission to view this page. Only Administrators can access it.

Calendar.title: Scheduled Action Plans
Calendar.admin_desc: Scheduled action plans entered for all criteria at the institutional level.
Calendar.user_desc: Scheduled action plans created for the criteria assigned to your unit.
Calendar.no_plan_desc: When you create a Scheduled Action Plan by going to the Planning tab in the Criteria menu, it will be listed here.

Reports.title: Global Institutional Report
Reports.description: A comprehensive synthesis of all strategic criteria and quality processes of the institution.
Reports.generating_desc: Merging PDCA phases of all units. This process may take a few seconds.
Reports.report_summary: Compiles all main headings, sub-criteria, and written texts sequentially into a single file, along with evidences.
Reports.no_report_yet: No results report (Phase 7) has been created for this criterion yet.
Reports.auto_generated_footer: This document was automatically generated by the quality management system.
Reports.unauthorized_desc: You do not have permission to view and create the institutional report. Only Administrators can access it.
